---
title: "Time of death estimation using forehead temperature measurements"
author: "Lennart Bedarf"
date: "2026-05-26"
categories: [Conferece]
---

![](thumbnail.jpg)

<strong>Bedarf, L.</strong>, Gerlach K., Wittig H., Scheurer E., Berger C., Lenz C. (2026).
<em>Time of death estimation using forehead temperature measurements</em>

![](Poster_IAFS2026_Bedarf_ToD.pdf){width=100% height=1000px}
